mapper.sql: id, fund_code, fund_name, type_code_one, type_code_two, type_code_three, subject_code, subject_name, company_code, company_name, fund_size, net_value, total_net_value, one_month, three_month, six_month, one_year, three_year, five_year, to_this_day, is_use, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO fund (fund_code, fund_name, type_code_one, type_code_two, type_code_three, subject_code, subject_name, company_code, company_name, fund_size, net_value, total_net_value, one_month, three_month, six_month, one_year, three_year, five_year, to_this_day) VALUES
(#{fund.fundCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.fundName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.typeCodeOne, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.typeCodeTwo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.typeCodeThree, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.subjectCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.subjectName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.companyCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.fundSize, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.netValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.totalNetValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.oneMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.threeMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.sixMonth, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.oneYear, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.threeYear, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.fiveYear, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fund.toThisDay, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM `fund` WHERE is_use=1 AND fund_code IN
#{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT fund_code FROM `fund` WHERE is_use=1 AND fund_code IN
#{code, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
